title.purpose: Catbone identity and primary preview label.

motion.name: native-state
motion.purpose: Reference timing for native state feedback; GTK controls retain platform behavior.

components.name: Active Status
components.description: Text-plus-dot companion state that never relies on color alone.
components.css: .ds-status-active { color: #9A4B27; font: 600 14px/1.3 system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-status-active:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #D47A47; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Preference Row
components.description: Native-style title, explanation, and trailing control without nested cards.
components.html: Pointer TrackingLooks toward your pointer
components.css: .ds-pref-row { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 24px; min-height: 64px; padding: 12px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid #D8CEC8; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-pref-row small { display: block; margin-top: 4px; color: #6B5F59; } .ds-pref-row button:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #D47A47; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Quiet native action for resets and defaults.
components.css: .ds-button-secondary { min-height: 44px; padding: 8px 16px; border: 1px solid #D8CEC8; border-radius: 8px; background: #F8F3F0; color: #342C28; font: 500 14px/1.3 system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-button-secondary:hover { background: #F1E8E3; } .ds-button-secondary:active { background: #E9DDD6; } .ds-button-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #D47A47; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Destructive Text Button
components.description: Explicit quit action with restrained destructive emphasis.
components.css: .ds-button-destructive { min-height: 44px; padding: 8px 16px; border: 1px solid #D8CEC8; border-radius: 8px; background: #F8F3F0; color: #9A4B27; font: 600 14px/1.3 system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-button-destructive:hover { background: #F6E6DF; } .ds-button-destructive:active { background: #EED6CA; } .ds-button-destructive:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #D47A47; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Range Value
components.description: Range control paired with an always-visible formatted value.
components.css: .ds-range { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 180px 64px; align-items: center; gap: 12px; min-height: 64px; font: 500 14px/1.3 system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-range input { accent-color: #D47A47; } .ds-range input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #D47A47; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-range output { text-align: right; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

narrative.overview: Pixel Pet is a small, orderly place where the user checks on a companion and makes a few understandable choices. Libadwaita supplies platform typography, theming, focus behavior, controls, and tonal surfaces. The custom layer stays deliberately narrow so Catbone remains the personality.

rules.name: The Quiet Accent Rule
rules.body: Apricot remains under 10% of the surface. It indicates action or state and never decorates empty space.

rules.name: The System Theme Rule
rules.body: Light and dark appearances come from the user's system. Dark mode is never forced for category flavor.

rules.name: The One-Family Rule
rules.body: Use one system family across headings, labels, controls, and supporting text. Novelty display faces are forbidden.

rules.name: The Still Surface Rule
rules.body: Motion communicates native control state only. No entrance choreography, bounce, or decorative loops appear outside the Pet Preview.

dos: Do follow native GTK focus order, keyboard behavior, and system theming.
Do use the 4px spacing family and vary rhythm deliberately.
Do keep pixel art nearest-neighbor sampled and optically centered.
Do make safe settings apply and save together.
Do preserve text labels alongside color and icons.
Do freeze preview motion when system animations are disabled.
donts: Don't create a dense developer-control dashboard.
Don't use neon gamer aesthetics or Razer Synapse-style hardware chrome.
Don't compose the window from generic nested card grids.
Don't let decorative animation compete with the Pet Preview.
Don't rasterize interface text or imitate generated window chrome.
